name: Best Ever Broccoli Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the eggs with the chicken broth, heavy cream, salt, and tabasco sauce. Set aside.
2. Prick the bottom and sides of the unbaked pastry shell. Bake at 450°F for 5 minutes.
3. Remove from the oven. Sprinkle the pastry shell with half of the parmesan cheese.
4. Scatter half of the broccoli, swiss cheese, and scallions into the shell.
5. Repeat with another layer of broccoli, swiss cheese, and scallions.
6. Pour the egg mixture over these ingredients and sprinkle with the remaining parmesan cheese.
7. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 325°F and bake for an additional 25 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
